name: mhc_class_II_chr8
description: Zebrafish MHC: mhc class II region on chr8 — DAB/DGB paralogs; class II is on a completely different chromosome from class I, reflecting the ancestral teleost MHC fragmentation. Unlike tetrapods, zebrafish MHC class I and class II are unlinked and dispersed across multiple chromosomes — the canonical 'MHC region' concept does not apply. Each subfamily has 5-30 paralogs with intra-cluster identity 75-95%. High population polymorphism: >100 alleles described per locus.
